mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 确认复现。Step 1-25: 创建 Bar Chart widget，选择 Test Tracker 作为 trackable，将 Timeframe 从 Today 改为 This Week，保存成功（widget 出现在 Dashboard）。Step 31-33: 通过三点菜单 → Edit Widget 重新打开编辑界面，发现 Timeframe 字段被重置为 Today（应为 This Week）。Trackable 字段正确保留，说明 bug 仅影响 Timeframe 的持久化逻辑。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: BUG DETECTED! Timeframe field has been reset from 'This Week' back to 'Today' after saving and reopening the widget. The widget Timeframe setting is not being persisted correctly.
